---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new function, capability, or behavior for this module
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve?
Why does it matter for the module or workflow?

## Desired Behavior

Describe what the function or feature should do.
What is the expected user-facing behavior?

## Acceptance Criteria

List the conditions that must be true for this to be considered complete.

- [ ] Public function name and purpose defined
- [ ] Input parameters and output shape described
- [ ] Edge cases identified
- [ ] Tests planned (unit + integration)
- [ ] Documentation impact noted (help, examples, README)

## Implementation Notes (optional)

Any thoughts on approach, helpers, dependencies, or constraints?
This is where you can brain-dump ideas without committing to them.

## Out of Scope (optional)

What *won't* be included in this feature?
